member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.AliasingPlayground
member.summary: Types used to validate token-aware aliasing.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.AliasingPlayground.UseComparer(System.StringComparer)
member.summary: Accepts a non-aliased BCL type that contains "String" as a substring. Used to ensure token-aware aliasing does not transform "StringComparer".

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.AliasingPlayground.Mix(System.String,System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Mixes aliasable tokens with non-aliasable substrings so the renderer aliases true tokens while leaving larger identifiers intact.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.XItem
member.summary: Types used to exercise nested generic signatures in XML docs.

member.name: T:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground
member.summary: Generic playground for exercising nested generic parameter lists.

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground.Flatten(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Xml2Doc.Sample.XItem}})
member.remarks: This used to surface a stray brace in signatures like IEnumerable{IEnumerable{XItem}}. The renderer must output IEnumerable<IEnumerable<XItem>> (no extra }). See also .

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground.Index(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Xml2Doc.Sample.XItem}})
member.summary: Builds an index over a nested structure.
member.remarks: Signature includes Dictionary{string, List{XItem}} which must render as Dictionary<string, List<XItem>> (no stray braces).

member.name: M:Xml2Doc.Sample.GenericPlayground.Transform``2(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{``0,System.Collections.Generic.List{``1}}})
member.summary: Tests generic method arity formatting and nested generic parameters.
